meta.title: Fine tune and Serve Faster Whisper Turbo
meta.description:
➡️ Colab Notebook: https://colab.research.google.com/drive/1OkT0CLE219qbwQoXV94wNk_4Un7Du2sH?usp=sharing
➡️ Get Life-time Access to the ADVANCED Transcription Scripts (and future improvements): https://Trelis.com/ADVANCED-transcription
➡️ One-click-templates: https://github.com/TrelisResearch/one-click-llms
➡️ Newsletter: https://blog.Trelis.com
➡️ Resources/Support/Discord: https://Trelis.com/About
➡️ Thumbnail made with this tutorial: https://youtu.be/ThKYjTdkyP8

OTHER RESOURCES:
- Faster Whisper: https://github.com/SYSTRAN/faster-whisper
- CTranslate2: https://github.com/OpenNMT/CTranslate2/
- Insanely Fast Whisper: https://github.com/Vaibhavs10/insanely-fast-whisper

TIMESTAMPS:
0:00 Whisper Turbo Fine-tuning and Serving
0:39 Colab Demo: Transcribing Audio Files and Youtube Audio
2:34 How does Whisper (Turbo) work?
6:00 Faster Whisper, Insanely Fast Whisper, and Fast Whisper Server?
8:01 Fine-tuning Whisper Turbo for new words or accents
16:27 Automating training data cleanup with LLMs
18:36 Chunking our input audio and text data and pushing to hub
22:27 LoRA and Trainer Setup
25:15 Saving, evaluating and converting the model for OpenAI format and Faster Whisper
29:24 Setting up a Faster Whisper Server Endpoint
